items.title_en: Can I disable all data collection from my vehicle?
items.title_zh: 我能否完全禁用车辆的数据收集？
items.summary_en: Car makers generally allow opting out of some data collection, but completely disabling telemetry is often not possible due to safety, features, and updates. The Rivian guidance illustrates what can be turned off and what remains required for core functions like safety and navigation.
items.summary_zh: 多数车企允许关闭某些数据收集，但完全禁用遥测往往因安全性、功能性和更新需求而受限。Rivian 的指南显示哪些数据可以关闭、哪些仍然被收集用于安全与导航等核心功能。

items.title_en: Claude Code refuses requests or charges extra if your commits mention "OpenClaw"
items.title_zh: Claude Code 对提及 OpenClaw 的提交拒绝请求，甚至额外收费
items.summary_en: Claude Code reportedly refuses or incurs extra charges for requests tied to the phrase OpenClaw, illustrating guardrails around prompts and naming in coding assistants. The detail reflects how policy constraints and pricing are implemented in AI development tools.
items.summary_zh: 报道称 Claude Code 对提及 OpenClaw 的提交拒绝请求，甚至额外收费，体现对特定提示的安全与定价策略在编码助手中的应用。

items.title_en: How Mark Klein told the EFF about Room 641A [book excerpt]
items.title_zh: 马克·克莱因向 EFF 披露641A室内幕的书摘
items.summary_en: Mark Klein, a former AT&T technician, disclosed to the EFF the existence of Room 641A, a secret facility where fiber-optic lines were allegedly tapped for mass surveillance. The excerpt presents his firsthand account and the ensuing controversy, showing how insider disclosures can catalyze public scrutiny and policy debate around surveillance. It underscores the lasting impact whistleblowers have on privacy advocacy and reform efforts.
items.summary_zh: 前 AT&T 技术员 Mark Klein 向电子前哨基金会披露了“641A 室”的存在，据称在那里对光纤线路进行了大规模监控拦截。书摘给出他的第一手叙述及随后的争议，展示了内部披露如何点燃公众关注并推动 surveillance 相关的政策辩论。此事凸显举报人在隐私倡议与改革中的长期影响。

items.title_en: Belgium stops decommissioning nuclear power plants
items.title_zh: 比利时暂停核电站退役计划
items.summary_en: Belgium has paused its plan to decommission certain nuclear power plants, citing energy security and potential gaps in supply. The move illustrates the tension between decarbonization goals and reliable power, and could influence regional energy policy.
items.summary_zh: 比利时宣布暂停核电站退役计划，强调保障能源供应的现实需要。此举揭示了在实现低碳目标与确保电力稳定之间的权衡，可能影响区域能源治理与政策走向。

items.title_en: For Linux kernel vulnerabilities, there is no heads-up to distributions
items.title_zh: Linux 内核漏洞：对发行版没有事先通知
items.summary_en: Linux kernel vulnerability disclosures often fail to provide a formal heads-up to distributions, delaying patch adoption. The situation highlights gaps in how advisories propagate from researchers to downstream users, affecting enterprise risk management.
items.summary_zh: Linux 内核漏洞的披露往往没有直接向发行版提供正式的事先通知，导致修补落地延迟。这暴露了研究人员、公告渠道与发行版维护之间的信息传递断层，影响企业的风险管理和修补节奏。

items.title_en: Spain's parliament will act against massive IP blockages by LaLiga
items.title_zh: 西班牙议会将对 LaLiga 的大规模 IP 阻断采取行动
items.summary_en: Spain's parliament plans to curb mass IP blockades pushed by La Liga, addressing concerns over overbroad blocks that can affect legitimate sites. The move signals a push for more measured, privacy-respecting enforcement while preserving anti-piracy aims. It highlights the tension between content protection and civil liberties in digital policy.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙议会计划限制 La Liga 推动的广泛 IP 阻断措施，纠正对合法站点和服务的过度封锁。此举旨在在实现反盗版目标的同时，推动更克制、尊重隐私的执法方式。

items.title_en: LinkedIn scans for 6,278 extensions and encrypts the results into every request
items.title_zh: LinkedIn 对浏览器扩展进行大规模扫描并将结果加密到每次请求中
items.summary_en: LinkedIn reportedly scans thousands of browser extensions and encrypts the scan results into every HTTP request. This approach can enhance platform security, but creates a persistent data fingerprint that moves with each page load and could raise privacy concerns. It spotlights the tension between security visibility and user privacy.
items.summary_zh: LinkedIn 对成千上万的浏览器扩展进行扫描，并把扫描结果整合进每次请求中。这种做法既能提升平台安全可见性，又会在每次页面加载时生成持续的数据指纹，增加隐私和数据外泄风险，凸显安全审查与用户隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: U.S. Senators Vote to Ban Themselves from Trading on Prediction Markets
items.title_zh: 美国参议员投票禁止自己在预测市场交易
items.summary_en: Senators vote to ban themselves from trading on prediction markets, addressing conflict-of-interest concerns. The rule change could influence lawmakers' financial transparency and policy-making credibility.
items.summary_zh: 参议员通过一项法规，禁止自己在预测市场进行交易，以应对利益冲突问题。这一改革可能影响立法透明度与政策制定的公信力。

items.title_en: Zed 1.0
items.title_zh: Zed 1.0 发布
items.summary_en: Zed 1.0 marks the first stable release of the Zed language, accompanied by its tooling and documentation. The release signals readiness for broader adoption in systems programming and showcases a focus on safe, expressive syntax and productive tooling.
items.summary_zh: Zed 1.0 标志着 Zed 语言的首个稳定版本及其工具链的发布。此举表明该语言准备迎接更广泛的应用，强调安全、可读性强的语法和高效的开发工具。

items.title_en: Shai-Hulud Themed Malware Found in the PyTorch Lightning AI Training Library
items.title_zh: 在 PyTorch Lightning 训练库中发现以 Shai-Hulud 为主题的恶意依赖
items.summary_en: Researchers found a malware-laden dependency in the PyTorch Lightning AI training library, themed around Shai-Hulud from Dune. The incident highlights the ongoing supply-chain risk in ML tooling, where critical libraries can be hijacked or compromised. It emphasizes the need for strict dependency vetting, vendor auditing, and reproducible environments to keep ML workflows secure.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在 PyTorch Lightning 的 AI 训练库中发现了一个带有 Shai-Hulud 主题的恶意依赖。此事件暴露了机器学习工具链的持续供应链风险——核心库可能被劫持或被植入恶意代码。强调对依赖项的严格审查、供应商审核，以及可重复环境的重要性，以确保 ML 工作流安全。

items.title_en: Show HN: Winpodx – run Windows apps on Linux as native windows
items.title_zh: Show HN：Winpodx——在 Linux 上以本地 Windows 窗口运行 Windows 应用
items.summary_en: Show HN: Winpodx enables Windows apps to run on Linux with native-looking Windows windows, illustrating progress in cross-OS app compatibility. The project demonstrates how far toolchains and UI integration have come for Linux users.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Winpodx 让 Windows 应用在 Linux 上以原生 Windows 窗口显示运行，体现跨操作系统应用兼容性的进展。该项目展示了 Linux 用户在工具链和 UI 集成方面的最新进展。

items.title_en: OpenWarp
items.title_zh: OpenWarp
items.summary_en: OpenWarp appears to be an open-source project focused on warp-themed tooling.
items.summary_zh: OpenWarp 看起来是一个聚焦于 warp 相关工具的开源项目。

items.title_en: Where the goblins came from
items.title_zh: 地精来自何方
items.summary_en: Explores the origins and evolution of goblins in folklore and modern storytelling.
items.summary_zh: 探讨地精在民间传说与现代叙事中的起源及演变。

items.title_en: Meta in row after workers who saw smart glasses users having sex lose jobs
items.title_zh: Meta 因目睹智能眼镜用户性行为而解雇员工引发争议
items.summary_en: Reports describe workers who witnessed sexual content captured by smart glasses being fired, fueling a debate about AR surveillance, privacy, and job security. It underscores how monitoring tools in immersive workplaces can clash with employee rights and company policies.
items.summary_zh: 报道称因员工看到通过智能眼镜记录的性内容而被解雇，引发对增强现实监控在职场中的应用、隐私与裁员政策的讨论。事件凸显科技公司在利用监控工具时需要权衡效率与员工权益。

items.title_en: Ghostty is leaving GitHub
items.title_zh: Ghostty 将离开 GitHub
items.summary_en: Ghostty is leaving GitHub, signaling concerns about platform bind and the viability of OSS workflows outside centralized hosting. The move prompts reflection on dependencies, portability, and how maintainers plan long-term collaboration without GitHub’s ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Ghostty 将离开 GitHub，凸显了在中心化托管之外维持开源工作流的挑战与风险。此举引发对依赖关系、可移植性以及维护者在无 GitHub 生态的情况下如何长期协作的思考。

items.title_en: How an oil refinery works
items.title_zh: 炼油厂如何运作
items.summary_en: An oil refinery uses distillation towers to separate crude oil into fuels and feedstocks, then refines these streams through cracking, reforming, and blending. The process is large-scale, energy-intensive, and central to energy economics, making understanding it valuable for anyone following infrastructure tech.
items.summary_zh: 炼油厂通过塔式蒸馏等工艺把原油分离成燃料和化工原料，再经裂解、改质和混合进行深加工。这个过程规模庞大、能耗高，是能源经济的核心，理解其流程有助于把握能源市场的运行。

items.title_en: Copy Fail
items.title_zh: 拷贝失败
items.summary_en: Copy Fail catalogs misprints, copy errors, and UX writing flubs from tech projects, highlighting how small wording mistakes can derail user understanding. It’s a reminder for developers to invest in clear, consistent copy.
items.summary_zh: Copy Fail 汇集科技项目中的印刷与文案错误，展示用词不当如何扰乱用户理解。提醒开发者重视清晰、连贯的文案。

items.title_en: Mozilla's opposition to Chrome's Prompt API
items.title_zh: Mozilla 反对 Chrome 的 Prompt API
items.summary_en: Mozilla has voiced concerns about Chrome's Prompt API, arguing it could complicate user consent and privacy controls and fragment browser standards. The stance highlights ongoing tensions between platform features, privacy safeguards, and interoperability in browser ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 对 Chrome 的 Prompt API 表态反对，担心会削弱用户同意与隐私控制，并破坏跨浏览器标准的一致性。这一立场凸显了浏览器生态中对隐私保护、功能设计与互操作性的持续博弈。

items.title_en: I built a Game Boy emulator in F#
items.title_zh: 我用 F# 构建了一个 Game Boy 模拟器
items.summary_en: I built a Game Boy emulator in F# from scratch, tackling the platform's timing, CPU, and memory quirks with a functional language. The project showcases how expressive, type-safe FP languages can still perform low-level emulation, and offers insights on bridging game architecture with modern tooling. It's a proof-of-concept that highlights the trade-offs between expressiveness and performance in hobby hardware emulation.
items.summary_zh: 作者用 F# 从零开始实现了一个 Game Boy 模拟器，需处理时序、CPU 与内存等细节。这个项目展示了函数式语言在底层仿真中的可行性与权衡，给出在现代工具链下进行硬件仿真的经验与启示。

items.title_en: Vercel’s pricing page
items.title_zh: Vercel 的定价页
items.summary_en: An analysis of Vercel's pricing page shows how layout, wording, and tiering influence signups and perceived value.
items.summary_zh: 对 Vercel 的定价页进行剖析，显示排版、措辞与分层设计如何影响用户转化与对价值的感知。分析揭示定价心理学及开发者在选购托管方案时可能遇到的坑。

items.title_en: HERMES.md in commit messages causes requests to route to extra usage billing
items.title_zh: 提交信息中的 HERMES.md 会将请求路由至额外的使用量计费
items.summary_en: A misconfigured billing rule triggers extra usage charges whenever a commit message contains the string HERMES.md. The quirk demonstrates how tiny pieces of metadata in version control can unexpectedly affect costs, and suggests teams sanitize commit messages or adjust policy to avoid surprise bills.
items.summary_zh: 提交信息中包含 HERMES.md 会把请求路由到额外的使用量计费，这暴露了版本控制元数据对成本的潜在影响。为避免意外账单，团队应对提交信息进行清洗并审查计费策略。

items.title_en: Cursor Camp
items.title_zh: Cursor Camp（光标营地）
items.summary_en: Cursor Camp is a playful browser-based demo from Neal.fun exploring cursor-driven interactions. It demonstrates how tiny UX choices shape engagement and user intuition in a compact, observable experiment.
items.summary_zh: Cursor Camp 是 Neal.fun 推出的一款有趣的浏览器演示，聚焦光标交互。通过一个简短的实验，展示了微小的 UX 设计选择如何影响用户参与和直觉。

items.title_en: CPanel and WHM Authentication Bypass – CVE-2026-41940
items.title_zh: CPanel 与 WHM 身份认证绕过漏洞——CVE-2026-41940
items.summary_en: CPanel/WHM authentication bypass CVE-2026-41940 is a critical flaw affecting millions of servers; attackers can bypass login and gain control. Patching and applying mitigations is essential to protect sites.
items.summary_zh: CPanel/WHM 的 CVE-2026-41940 是一项影响大量服务器的关键漏洞，攻击者可绕过身份验证获得控制权。迅速打补丁并应用缓解措施以保护站点。

items.title_en: The Zig project's rationale for their anti-AI contribution policy
items.title_zh: Zig 对 AI 贡献的明确反对立场及理由
items.summary_en: Zig's contributor policy explicitly rejects AI-generated code, citing quality, licensing, and accountability concerns. The policy emphasizes human-authored provenance and review as essential to maintaining code integrity.
items.summary_zh: Zig 的反对 AI 贡献政策明确拒绝 AI 生成的代码，理由包括质量、许可和问责等问题。该政策强调保持代码的人工源头和人工审查，以确保代码的完整性。

items.title_en: I aggregated 28 US Government auction sites into one search
items.title_zh: 我把 28 个美国政府拍卖网站聚合成一个搜索入口
items.summary_en: I aggregated 28 US government auction sites into one search tool to simplify finding assets, surplus equipment, and procurement opportunities. The project illustrates the value of unifying public-data sources to boost efficiency, while data freshness and reliability remain important.
items.summary_zh: 作者把 28 个美国政府拍卖网站聚合为一个检索入口，便于发现资产、闲置设备与采购机会。此举体现整合公开数据源以提升效率的趋势，但数据的时效性与可信度同样重要。

items.title_en: GCC 16 has been released
items.title_zh: GCC 16 已发布
items.summary_en: GCC 16 release brings new language features, improved diagnostics, and performance improvements across C and C++ toolchains, plus build and target updates. Developers should consider upgrading to access safer tooling and modern optimizations.
items.summary_zh: GCC 16 发布带来新特性、诊断改进与跨 C/C++ 的性能优化，还包括对目标和构建流程的更新。开发者升级后可获得更安全的工具链与现代化特性。

items.title_en: Honker – Durable queues, streams, pub/sub, and cron scheduler in a SQLite file
items.title_zh: SQLite 文件中的持久化队列、流、Pub/Sub 与 cron 调度器
items.summary_en: A single SQLite file can host durable queues, streams, pub/sub, and a cron-like scheduler, enabling complex data workflows without external services. This approach can be appealing for edge apps or offline-first systems.
items.summary_zh: 一个 SQLite 文件就能承载持久化队列、流、发布/订阅和类似 cron 的调度功能，从而在不依赖外部服务的情况下实现复杂数据工作流。文中探讨如何在一个紧凑的数据存储中实现原语，权衡简单性与潜在的性能、可移植性之间的取舍，适合边缘计算或离线优先场景。

items.title_en: Granite 4.1: IBM's 8B Model Matching 32B MoE
items.title_zh: Granite 4.1：IBM 的 8B 模型与 32B MoE
items.summary_en: Granite 4.1 introduces open-source tooling for aligning an 8B base model with a 32B MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture, enabling scalable inference and modular model design. It signals IBM's ongoing push to empower open AI tooling and explore mixture-of-experts approaches for efficiency.
items.summary_zh: Granite 4.1 是一个开源模型家族，展示将一个 8B 基模型与 32B MoE 架构结合的能力，支持可扩展推理与模块化模型设计。体现 IBM 在开源 AI 工具与专家门控混合模型领域的持续探索。

items.title_en: Online age verification is the hill to die on
items.title_zh: 在线年龄验证是必须坚持的关键议题
items.summary_en: Online age verification is framed as a policy-critical tool for safeguarding minors online, but it raises privacy and accessibility concerns. The piece argues this is a central battleground for technology design and regulation.
items.summary_zh: 在线年龄验证被视为保护未成年人的关键工具，但也引发隐私与可访问性担忧。文章强调这是技术设计与监管的核心争论点。

items.title_en: Snowball Earth may hide a far stranger climate cycle than anyone expected
items.title_zh: 雪球地球理论可能隐藏比预期更古怪的气候循环
items.summary_en: New climate research suggests Snowball Earth could involve more intricate climate cycles than previously imagined, implying a richer set of feedback mechanisms governing global glaciation and deglaciation.
items.summary_zh: 最新气候研究表明，雪球地球现象可能包含比以往设想更复杂的气候循环，意味着全球冰川化与退冰过程背后有更丰富的反馈机制。

items.title_en: Does Postgres Scale?
items.title_zh: PostgreSQL 能否扩展？
items.summary_en: A benchmark examines how well Postgres scales for workflow execution, testing parallel task handling and throughput under realistic workloads. The results offer guidance for architects choosing database backends for data-heavy automation and pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 一项基准测试评估 PostgreSQL 在工作流执行中的可扩展性，测试在现实工作负载下的并行任务处理与吞吐量。结果为在数据密集型自动化与流水线场景下选择数据库后端提供参考。

items.title_en: Full-Text Search with DuckDB
items.title_zh: DuckDB 的全文检索
items.summary_en: A practical guide to enabling full-text search with DuckDB, outlining the setup, indexing strategies, and performance considerations. The piece demonstrates how embedded analytics databases can provide rich search capabilities without requiring separate search engines, useful for data apps and notebooks. It also notes caveats compared to dedicated search systems.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 DuckDB 中实现全文检索的实用指南，涵盖设置、索引策略及性能考量。展示了嵌入式分析数据库在无需独立搜索引擎的情况下提供丰富检索能力，对数据应用和笔记本场景尤为有用，同时也提醒了相对于专门的搜索系统的局限。

items.title_en: Apple reports second quarter results
items.title_zh: 苹果发布第二季度业绩
items.summary_en: Apple reported its second-quarter results, with continued strength in services and iPhone ecosystem, while investors watch for margins and future guidance amid macro headwinds.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布第二季度业绩，服务与 iPhone 生态继续强劲，但投资者将关注毛利率与未来展望，以及在宏观挑战下的增长动能。

items.title_en: $500M for Virtual Biology Initiative, Funded by Zuckerbergs
items.title_zh: 由扎克伯格家族资助的虚拟生物学计划获 5 亿美元资助
items.summary_en: A $500 million commitment to a Virtual Biology Initiative backed by the Zuckerbergs aims to accelerate computational biology, simulations, and virtual experiments.
items.summary_zh: 由扎克伯格家族支持的虚拟生物学计划获5亿美元资助，目标是推动计算生物学、仿真和虚拟实验的发展。

items.title_en: We need a federation of forges
items.title_zh: Tangled：我们需要一个联邦制的代码托管平台网络
items.summary_en: Tangled argues for a federation of code forges to avoid vendor lock-in and improve collaboration. It sketches a model for interoperable identities, permissions, and data exchange across platforms, with governance considerations for a healthy ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Tangled 主张建立一个联邦制的代码托管平台网络，以避免厂商锁定并提升协作。文中勾画了在各个平台间实现互操作身份、权限与数据交换的模型，并就健康生态的治理提出思路。

items.title_en: Craig Venter has died
items.title_zh: 克雷格·文特纳辞世
items.summary_en: Renowned genomics pioneer Craig Venter has died at 79. His work accelerating whole-genome sequencing and founding JCVI helped reshape biomedical research and the race toward personalized medicine.
items.summary_zh: 全球知名的基因组学先驱克雷格·文特纳去世，享年79岁。他推动整基因组测序的成本下降与速度提升，并创立 JCVI，深刻影响了生物医学研究和个性化医疗的发展。

items.title_en: Follow-up to Carrot disclosure: Forgejo
items.title_zh: Carrot 披露后续：Forgejo
items.summary_en: A follow-up discussion ties the Carrot disclosure to Forgejo, examining the security implications and how open-source projects should respond to disclosure incidents.
items.summary_zh: 关于 Carrot 披露的跟进将焦点放在 Forgejo，探讨安全影响以及开源项目在披露事件中的应对之道。

items.title_en: OpenTrafficMap
items.title_zh: OpenTrafficMap 开放交通地图
items.summary_en: OpenTrafficMap crowdsources and hosts open traffic data to create a free, open-access map of road conditions. By emphasizing openness and community contributions, it offers an alternative to proprietary map datasets and can power free APIs and dashboards.
items.summary_zh: OpenTrafficMap 倡导开放数据和社区贡献，汇总交通信息并提供免费可访问的地图。它为替代私有地图数据集的解决方案，并可支持开放 API 与数据可视化。

items.title_en: A 1960s art school experiment that redefined creativity
items.title_zh: 1960 年代美术学院的一场重新定义创造力的实验
items.summary_en: This piece surveys a 1960s art-school experiment that reshaped how people think about creativity, likely involving interactive pedagogy and cross-disciplinary collaboration. It offers takeaways for design, education, and tech teams about nurturing experimentation and breaking intellectual boundaries. The lesson is that curricula can unlock new modes of creative thinking when teachers embrace risk and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾了1960年代美术学院的一场实验，重新定义了人们对创造力的理解，往往涉及互动式教学与跨学科协作。为设计、教育乃至科技团队提供启示：在教师鼓励冒险与协作的条件下，课程能开启全新的创造力表达方式。

items.title_en: Soft launch of open-source code platform for government
items.title_zh: 政府开放源代码平台进行软启动
items.summary_en: A government-backed open-source code platform is entering a soft launch, inviting developers to contribute and test components for public-sector software. The initiative aims to accelerate modernization, improve security through collaborative development, and reduce vendor lock-in.
items.summary_zh: 由政府牵头的开源代码平台进入软启动阶段，邀请开发者参与测试和贡献。此举旨在加速公共部门软件现代化、提升安全性并减少厂商锁定。

items.title_en: The FCC is about to ban 21% of its test labs today. I mapped them all
items.title_zh: FCC 将禁用 21% 的测试实验室：完整映射结果
items.summary_en: An analysis reveals the FCC will ban 21% of its accredited test labs, with a complete map of the labs. The write-up discusses potential impacts on device certification timelines and QA in the hardware ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 文中披露 FCC 将禁止 21% 的经认证测试实验室，并对所有实验室进行了完整映射。对设备认证进度和硬件质量控制可能带来影响，凸显了解实验室网络全貌的重要性。

items.title_en: FastCGI: 30 years old and still the better protocol for reverse proxies
items.title_zh: FastCGI：三十年依旧是反向代理的更好协议
items.summary_en: FastCGI is argued to remain the practical choice for reverse proxies, offering low latency and stable performance in many setups. The post contends that, despite being decades old, it can outperform newer protocols in certain workloads and deserves continued consideration.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为 FastCGI 仍是反向代理的切实可行选择，在多种场景下提供低延迟和稳定性能。尽管诞生三十余年，它在某些工作负载中仍优于新协议，值得在现代栈中继续考量。

items.title_en: Kyoto cherry blossoms now bloom earlier than at any point in 1,200 years
items.title_zh: 京都樱花比1200年以来的任何时候都早盛开
items.summary_en: Kyoto's cherry blossoms are blooming earlier than any time in 1,200 years, underscoring rapid phenology shifts linked to climate change. The trend affects tourism planning around peak bloom and raises questions about regional adaptation.
items.summary_zh: 京都樱花开花时间比 1200 年来任何时刻都更早，反映出与气候变化相关的物候期变化。此趋势会影响樱花季的旅游安排，并引发对区域适应策略的讨论。

items.title_en: American Dads Became the Parents Their Fathers Never Were
items.title_zh: 美国父亲们：成为了父辈从未成为的父母
items.summary_en: A Derek Thompson piece argues that wealthier dads now take on more parenting roles than their fathers did, reshaping expectations around fatherhood and time investment. It highlights how income, work culture, and policy shape caregiving norms in modern America.
items.summary_zh: Derek Thompson 的文章指出，富裕家庭的父亲如今在育儿中的投入超过父辈，正在重新塑造父亲角色与时间投入的期望。文章分析收入、工作文化与政策如何共同塑造当代美国家庭的育儿规范。

items.title_en: Recovering files from beyond the grave using PhotoRec
items.title_zh: 使用 PhotoRec 从已删除数据中恢复文件
items.summary_en: PhotoRec, a robust data recovery tool, demonstrates recovery capabilities even after deletion or partition damage scenarios. The piece walks through practical tips, caveats, and success cases, illustrating how open-source recovery tools can rescue valuable data. It emphasizes the importance of backups and the limitations of recovery in certain failure modes.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了使用 PhotoRec 这类强大的数据恢复工具，在删除或分区损坏等场景下尝试找回数据。文章给出实际操作要点、注意事项和成功案例，强调备份的重要性并指出在某些故障模式下恢复的局限性。

items.title_en: Alignment whack-a-mole: Finetuning activates recall of copyrighted books in LLMs
items.title_zh: 对齐打地鼠：微调会触发大模型对受版权保护书籍的记忆
items.summary_en: Fine-tuning for alignment can unintentionally unlock memorized copyrighted passages, as the model regains memory of specific books when prompted. This phenomenon raises copyright and compliance concerns for safety-focused training pipelines and highlights the need for better data handling, auditing, and mitigation strategies.
items.summary_zh: 对齐微调可能无意中触发模型对受版权保护文本的记忆，当被提示时会再现特定书籍的段落。这一现象暴露了安全对齐训练中的版权合规风险，并强调需要改进数据处理、审计与缓解方法。

items.title_en: Laws of UX
items.title_zh: UX 法则全集
items.summary_en: Laws of UX bundles practical design heuristics into a navigable reference for product teams, covering interaction timing, visual cues, and cognitive load. It serves as a quick checklist to avoid common UX pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 《UX 法则》汇集可操作的设计启发式，方便产品团队快速查阅，涵盖交互时序、视觉线索与认知负荷等要点，帮助避免常见的 UX 错误。

items.title_en: Biology is a Burrito: A text- and visual-based journey through a living cell
items.title_zh: 生物学就是一个卷饼：以文本与视觉探寻活细胞
items.summary_en: 'Biology is a Burrito' blends text and visuals to guide readers through a living cell, using a playful, modular format to reveal complex biology. The piece demonstrates a new way to communicate science that is both approachable and informative.
items.summary_zh: 《生物学就是一个卷饼》以文本与视觉的结合引导读者穿越活细胞，采用轻松模块化的形式揭示复杂生物学。此文展示了一种新型的科普表达，既易于接近又信息丰富。

items.title_en: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel and WHM
items.title_zh: 黑客积极利用 cPanel/WHM 漏洞
items.summary_en: Hackers are actively exploiting a vulnerability in cPanel/WHM, prompting urgent patching and security hardening for millions of websites.
items.summary_zh: 黑客正积极利用 cPanel/WHM 漏洞，促使大量网站紧急打补丁并加强安全防护。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pu.sh – a full coding-agent harness in 400 lines of shell
items.title_zh: Show HN: Pu.sh —— 用 400 行 shell 实现的完整编码代理工具
items.summary_en: Pu.sh showcases a compact, shell-based coding agent harness, demonstrating how orchestration tasks can be done with minimal code. It highlights the power and limits of shell for automation in AI-assisted workflows.
items.summary_zh: Pu.sh 展示在 400 行 shell 代码中实现的完整编码代理框架，演示利用极简代码进行任务编排的能力。该项目凸显了在 AI 辅助工作流中，Shell 脚本的优点与局限。

items.title_en: DataCenter.FM – background noise app featuring the sound of the AI bubble
items.title_zh: DataCenter.FM – 背景噪音应用，带来 AI 泡沫的声音
items.summary_en: A background-noise app that channels the AI hype cycle through sound design. It comments on how tech industry chatter shapes perceptions of AI progress.
items.summary_zh: DataCenter.FM 提供一个背景噪音应用，通过 AI 热潮的声音与气氛来反映科技行业的讨论氛围，揭示了 hype 循环如何影响开发者和投资者的情绪。

items.title_en: Largest Digital Human Rights Conference Suddenly Canceled
items.title_zh: 全球最大的数字人权会议 RightsCon 突然被取消
items.summary_en: RightsCon, the major digital human rights conference, was abruptly postponed or canceled, roiling the policy and advocacy communities. It signals how external events ripple through tech policy activism.
items.summary_zh: RightsCon 作为全球主要数字人权会议突然被取消，冲击了政策与倡导社群。文章探讨可能的原因、对正在进行的数字权利行动的影响，以及对主办方、参与者和赞助方的后续影响，反映出外部事件对科技政策行动的影响。

items.title_en: Maryland becomes first state to ban surveillance pricing in grocery stores
items.title_zh: 马里兰成为首个禁止超市使用监控定价的州
items.summary_en: Maryland becomes the first state to ban surveillance-based price discrimination in groceries, prohibiting price discrimination based on customer data. The move highlights growing policy attention to data-driven pricing and consumer privacy.
items.summary_zh: 马里兰成为首个禁止超市使用监控定价的州，禁止基于顾客数据的价格歧视做法。这一举措凸显对数据驱动定价与消费者隐私的日益关注。

items.title_en: Functional programmers need to take a look at Zig
items.title_zh: 功能性程序员应看看 Zig
items.summary_en: Zig, with its explicit memory model, predictable builds, and simple tooling, presents an appealing option for functional programmers seeking more control over performance and safety. Its approach to cross-compilation and error handling could complement functional styles rather than replace them.
items.summary_zh: Zig 以简洁的语言设计、确定性的构建流程和可控的内存管理，为追求性能与安全的函数式编程者提供了有吸引力的替代选择。它对跨平台编译和错误处理的做法，可能成为对功能式风格的有力补充而非取代。

items.title_en: The More Young People Use AI, the More They Hate It
items.title_zh: 年轻人越用 AI 越讨厌它
items.summary_en: Gen Z's growing use of AI correlates with rising dissatisfaction, driven by privacy concerns, output quality, and perceived hype vs. reality.
items.summary_zh: Gen Z 越来越多地使用 AI，却越发对其感到厌烦，担忧隐私、输出质量和炒作与现实的差距。文章探讨这对产品设计、教育与监管的影响。

items.title_en: An open-source stethoscope that costs between $2.5 and $5 to produce
items.title_zh: 成本仅2.5到5美元的开源听诊器
items.summary_en: An open-source stethoscope project can be produced for roughly $2.5–$5, illustrating how affordable hardware can empower medical access and education. It demonstrates how community-driven hardware can compress costs without compromising basic functionality.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源听诊器项目的单位生产成本约为2.5–5美元，展示了低成本硬件如何推动医疗普及与教育。此类社区驱动的硬件能在不牺牲基本功能的前提下降低门槛。

items.title_en: Mike: open-source legal AI
items.title_zh: Mike：开源法律 AI
items.summary_en: Mike is an open-source legal AI project that aims to provide transparent, auditable tooling for legal tasks. The project highlights community-driven collaboration and the push for accountable, plugin-friendly AI in regulated domains.
items.summary_zh: Mike 是一个开源法律 AI 项目，旨在提供透明、可审计的法律工作工具。该项目强调社区协作与在受监管领域中对可追责、可插件化 AI 的需求。

items.title_en: I scraped 1.94M Airbnb photos for opium dens, pet cameos, and messy kitchens
items.title_zh: 我抓取了 194 万张 Airbnb 照片，用于展示异趣房源与日常细节
items.summary_en: The author scraped 1.94 million Airbnb photos to illustrate diverse listings, raising questions about data collection ethics, privacy, and the use of public images for ML or research. It serves as a case study in data ethics and the potential for misuse or bias in large image datasets.
items.summary_zh: 作者抓取了约 194 万张 Airbnb 照片，用以展示不同房源的风格与细节，引发关于数据抓取伦理、隐私以及公开图片数据在机器学习或研究中的使用范围的讨论。该案例提醒开发者在数据采集时关注合规与潜在滥用风险。

items.title_en: Opus 4.7 knows the real Kelsey
items.title_zh: Opus 4.7 能认出真正的 Kelsey
items.summary_en: Opus 4.7 claims to know the real Kelsey, raising questions about identity, privacy, and how AI systems handle sensitive personal information.
items.summary_zh: Opus 4.7 声称识别出真实的 Kelsey，引发关于身份、隐私以及 AI 系统如何处理敏感个人信息的关注。

items.title_en: SatoshiGuesser – Roll for Bitcoin
items.title_zh: SatoshiGuesser – 为比特币来一把的掷骰子游戏
items.summary_en: A GitHub project that gamifies Bitcoin odds by rolling dice to simulate outcomes related to Satoshi, the smallest unit of BTC. The project blends crypto enthusiasm with probability play and can serve as a playful educational tool for understanding randomness in crypto systems.
items.summary_zh: 一个 GitHub 项目，通过掷骰子来模拟与比特币最小单位聪相关的赔率，玩味十足。该项目将对加密货币的热情与概率游戏结合，是理解区块链系统中随机性的有趣教育工具。

items.title_en: The Science Behind Honey's Eternal Shelf Life (2013)
items.title_zh: 蜂蜜永恒保质期背后的科学（2013）
items.summary_en: Explains why honey can last essentially indefinitely when stored properly: very low water activity, acidic pH, and natural antimicrobial compounds hinder microbial growth. It also notes practical caveats like crystallization and storage conditions.
items.summary_zh: 蜂蜜在妥善储存时几乎可无限保质的科学原因在于水活性极低、酸性环境和天然抗菌成分，文中也提及会结晶和存储条件对保质期的影响。

items.title_en: Talkie: a 13B vintage language model from 1930
items.title_zh: Talkie：一個13B參數的1930年代風格語言模型
items.summary_en: Talkie introduces a 13B parameter language model built around vintage, 1930s-inspired constraints, challenging modern assumptions about scale. The project explores how era-specific design choices impact capabilities and efficiency, offering a playful, instructive counterpoint to conventional LLM development.
items.summary_zh: Talkie 以1930年代的設計約束為背景，打造一個13B參數的語言模型，挑戰以規模取勝的現代觀點。該項目探討不同時代下的設計取捨如何影響模型能力與效率，為傳統大模型開發提供有趣且具啟發性的對照。

items.title_en: Why I still reach for Lisp and Scheme instead of Haskell
items.title_zh: 为何我仍偏爱 Lisp 和 Scheme 而不是 Haskell
items.summary_en: The author argues Lisp and Scheme offer macro systems, minimal syntax, and REPL-driven development that some programmers prefer over Haskell's strong type system. It advocates returning to the elegance of Lisp-family languages for exploration and rapid iteration.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张 Lisp 与 Scheme 的宏系统、简洁语法和交互式开发仍具魅力，优于 Haskell 的类型驱动风格。倡导在探索与快速迭代中回归 Lisp 系语言的简洁与灵活。

items.title_en: Monad Tutorials Timeline
items.title_zh: Monad 教程时间线
items.summary_en: The Monad Tutorials Timeline curates the history of teaching monads in the Haskell community, mapping key tutorials and their authors. It helps learners chart a path through one of programming's most influential concepts.
items.summary_zh: Monad 教程时间线整理了 Haskell 社区关于 Monad 教学的历史脉络，标注了关键教程与作者，帮助学习者梳理这一重要概念的学习路径。

items.title_en: 1.4 GW: battery storage at former Grohnde nuclear power plant
items.title_zh: 前 Grohnde 核电站 1.4GW 巨型储能
items.summary_en: A massive 1.4 GW battery storage project is planned at the site of the former Grohnde nuclear plant, signaling the shift to grid-scale storage and energy resilience. It shows how decommissioned plants can host renewable storage assets.
items.summary_zh: 在前 Grohnde 核电站计划建设 1.4GW 级别的巨型储能项目，标志着对电网规模化储能与能源韧性的重视。退役核电设施正在转为承载可再生储能的潜在资产。

items.title_en: Show HN: TRiP – a complete transformer engine in C built from scratch just by me
items.title_zh: Show HN: TRiP — 我用 C 从零实现的完整 Transformer 引擎
items.summary_en: TRiP is a complete transformer engine implemented in C from scratch by a single developer. The project demonstrates high-performance, low-level optimization for neural network inference and offers insights into architecture decisions, memory layout, and SIMD usage. It's a rare solo attempt at building an end-to-end inference stack, valuable for systems programmers and ML researchers alike.
items.summary_zh: TRiP 是一个由单人用 C 语言从零实现的完整 Transformer 引擎。项目展示了面向神经网络推理的高性能、低层优化，揭示了架构设计、内存布局和 SIMD 的使用等要点，对于系统程序员和机器学习研究者都具有参考价值。

items.title_en: 10Gb/s Ethernet: what I did to get it working in my home
items.title_zh: 家庭网络的 10Gb/s 以太网：实现过程与经验
items.summary_en: Practical steps to get 10GbE working at home, from hardware choices (NICs, switches) to cabling and configuration. The piece demystifies the upgrade path, offering real-world performance expectations and guidance on when 10GbE makes sense for a home lab or small office. It also covers compatibility and heat/power considerations.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在家庭环境中实现 10GbE 的实际步骤，从硬件选择、线缆、驱动到配置。文章解开升级谜团，给出真实世界的性能预期与何时值得投资的建议，同时讨论兼容性、热量与功耗等注意事项。

items.title_en: Japan Is Building Cardboard Suicide Drones
items.title_zh: 日本在打造纸板自杀式无人机
items.summary_en: Reports on Japan's development of cardboard-based suicide drones, a low-cost, disposable weapon concept raising ethical and security concerns.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示日本正在开发纸板材料制成的自杀式无人机，这种低成本、一次性武器概念引发伦理、安保与军事部署方面的讨论。

items.title_en: Ramp's Sheets AI Exfiltrates Financials
items.title_zh: Ramp 的 Sheets AI 外泄财务数据
items.summary_en: A security write-up shows Ramp's Sheets AI leaking financial data, illustrating how AI-assisted features in spreadsheets can introduce data exfiltration risks. It emphasizes robust data governance, access controls, and guardrails when deploying AI tools in finance.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究指出 Ramp 的 Sheets AI 可能会外泄财务数据，揭示在电子表格中加入 AI 功能会带来数据外泄风险。强调在金融场景部署 AI 工具时加强数据治理、访问控制和安全边界。

items.title_en: I accidentally made law enforcement shut down their fake honeypot
items.title_zh: 我不小心让执法部门关闭了他们的假蜜罐
items.summary_en: The author recounts accidentally taking down a law enforcement honeypot, illustrating the fragility of security experiments. The incident highlights legal and ethical boundaries in security research and the risk of unintended disruptions.
items.summary_zh: 作者意外使执法部门的假蜜罐离线，揭示安全实验的易损性与边界。此事强调安全研究中的法律与伦理界限，以及误配置可能造成的干扰。

items.title_en: Noctua releases official 3D CAD models for its cooling fans
items.title_zh: Noctua 发布官方风扇 3D CAD 模型
items.summary_en: Noctua releases official 3D CAD models for its cooling fans, enabling engineers to integrate high-quality fans into PC builds and hardware designs with accurate dimensions. The models cover multiple formats and licensing terms, streamlining CAD workflows.
items.summary_zh: Noctua 发布了官方风扇的 3D CAD 模型，使工程师能够在 PC 构建与硬件设计中准确对接风扇尺寸并无缝集成。提供多种格式与许可条款，简化 CAD 工作流程。

items.title_en: Joby kicks off NYC electric air taxi demos with historic JFK flight
items.title_zh: Joby 在纽约启动电动空中出租车示范，肯尼迪机场首飞具有历史意义
items.summary_en: Joby Aviation kicks off a NYC electric air taxi demo program with a historic JFK flight, showcasing urban air mobility in a real-world city setting. The demonstrations will test flight performance, safety, and regulatory pathways for future passenger service.
items.summary_zh: Joby Aviation 在纽约启动电动空中出租车示范，首场在肯尼迪机场的历史性飞行标志着城市空中出行的实际测试。示范将评估飞行性能、安全性及未来商用的监管路径。

items.title_en: GitHub – DOS 1.0: Transcription of Tim Paterson's DOS Printouts
items.title_zh: GitHub：DOS 1.0—Tim Paterson 的 DOS 打印稿逐字转录
items.summary_en: A historical data project transcribes Tim Paterson's DOS 1.0 printouts, revealing design decisions and implementation details from the original era. The work provides a rare window into early PC DOS development for historians and retro-computing enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: 这一历史档案项目对 Tim Paterson 的 DOS 1.0 打印稿进行逐字转录，揭示早期 DOS 设计与实现的细节。此工作为研究者与复古计算爱好者提供珍贵的历史视窗。

items.title_en: Letting AI play my game – building an agentic test harness to help play-testing
items.title_zh: 让 AI 玩我的游戏：构建一个具代理能力的测试框架以辅助试玩测试
items.summary_en: An experimental harness lets AI autonomously play a game, surfacing bugs and player-experience insights that human testers might miss. The setup discusses how to measure agentic play, handle non-determinism, and translate findings into test and design improvements.
items.summary_zh: 一个实验性框架让 AI 自动试玩游戏，能暴露人类测试难以发现的漏洞和体验问题。该方法涉及如何衡量代理行为、处理非确定性，并把发现转化为测试与设计改进。

items.title_en: How to Build the Future: Demis Hassabis [video]
items.title_zh: 如何构建未来：Demis Hassabis（视频）
items.summary_en: In this talk with Demis Hassabis, the DeepMind cofounder lays out a long-term, responsible path for AI progress, balancing ambition with safeguards and societal impact. It offers a candid perspective on what it takes to build transformative AI responsibly.
items.summary_zh: 在这段对话中，DeepMind 联合创始人 Demis Hassabis 描绘了 AI 发展中的长期、负责任路径，强调野心与安全防护并重。提供了关于如何负责任地打造具变革性的 AI 的直观观点。

items.title_en: Vera: a programming language designed for machines to write
items.title_zh: Vera：为机器编写代码而设计的编程语言
items.summary_en: Vera is a programming language aimed at machines writing code, exploring how automated generation can shape software development. Early experiments show potential for synthesis-driven workflows and new tooling paradigms.
items.summary_zh: Vera 是一门为“让机器去写代码”而设计的编程语言，研究自动化生成如何改变软件开发。早期实验显示在合成驱动的工作流和新工具范式方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Scott Aaronson on quantum: "Will you heed my warnings NOW?"
items.title_zh: Scott Aaronson 关于量子：‘现在你们会听我的警告吗？’
items.summary_en: Scott Aaronson reiterates urgent warnings about the long-term risks and timelines of quantum computing, urging policymakers, researchers, and the public to take precautions now. He discusses plausible futures, potential hazards, and strategies to mitigate existential risk.
items.summary_zh: Scott Aaronson 再次强调量子计算的长期风险与时间表，敦促政策制定者、研究者和公众立即采取应对措施。他讨论了可能的未来情景、潜在危害及减轻生存风险的策略。

items.title_en: What can we gain by losing infinity?
items.title_zh: 我们能通过失去无限获得什么？
items.summary_en: Explores how embracing finitary approaches or truncating infinite concepts can yield new mathematical or computational insights. The piece ties abstract ideas to practical gains in computation, physics, or philosophy, showing that shedding the ideal of infinity can lead to usable approximations or new theories. It emphasizes the value of finite models in tackling real-world problems.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在将无限概念简化或接受有限化时，如何带来新的数学或计算洞见。文章将抽象理念与计算、物理或哲学的实际应用联系起来，展示放弃无限理想能带来可用的近似或新理论，强调有限模型在现实问题中的价值。

items.title_en: Virtualisation on Apple Silicon Macs is different
items.title_zh: 苹果 Silicon 的虚拟化有何不同
items.summary_en: Apple Silicon virtualization differs from x86, with ARM-based virtualization stacks and tighter integration with macOS.
items.summary_zh: 苹果 Silicon 的虚拟化与 x86 存在差异，依赖于 ARM 架构的虚拟化栈并与 macOS 的集成更紧密。文章详述实际差异、性能影响以及在 Apple Silicon 上运行虚拟机的实践要点。

items.title_en: Microsoft open sources DOS 1.00 on 45th anniversary
items.title_zh: 微软在 DOS 1.00 45 周年之际开源源码
items.summary_en: On DOS 1.0's 45th anniversary, Microsoft released the open-source release of the original operating system code, offering historical insight into the original software and development practices. The release invites researchers and enthusiasts to study early OS design and Microsoft’s archival practices.
items.summary_zh: 在 DOS 1.0 45 周年之际，微软公开了原始操作系统代码的开源版本，为研究早期软件与开发实践提供宝贵资料。此举为研究者与爱好者提供了了解早期操作系统设计与微软存档实践的机会。

items.title_en: Making AI chatbots friendly leads to mistakes and support of conspiracy theories
items.title_zh: 让 AI 聊天机器人更友好会导致错误并助长阴谋论
items.summary_en: A study shows that making AI chatbots friendlier can increase user trust but also lead to mistakes and a higher chance of conspiracy-belief propagation. It warns designers to balance friendliness with accuracy and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现让 AI 聊天机器人更友好会提高用户信任，却也可能带来错误和助长阴谋论的传播。提醒设计师在友好度、准确性和安全机制之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: At Protocol: Building the Social Internet
items.title_zh: At Protocol：打造社交互联网
items.summary_en: At Protocol outlines a plan for a decentralized social internet, emphasizing interoperability, user ownership of data, and open governance. It frames a shift away from centralized platforms toward portable social networks.
items.summary_zh: At Protocol 描绘了一个去中心化的社交互联网愿景，强调数据所有权、互操作性和开放治理，倡导让社交网络摆脱对单一平台的依赖。

items.title_en: Reverse Engineering SimTower
items.title_zh: 逆向工程 SimTower
items.summary_en: A technical post explores reverse engineering the classic SimTower, revealing how its simulation logic and scheduling work under the hood. The write-up serves as a case study in analyzing legacy sim software and could inspire methods for modern game/tool reverse engineering.
items.summary_zh: 技术文章揭秘对经典游戏 SimTower 的逆向工程，揭示其内部仿真逻辑与调度机制。作为对遗留仿真软件分析的案例，或为现代游戏与工具的逆向研究提供思路。

items.title_en: Zulip 12.0 Released
items.title_zh: Zulip 12.0 发布
items.summary_en: Zulip 12.0 brings new features and performance improvements to its streaming chat platform, improving workflows for teams with intricate threading and integrations. The release signals ongoing maturity of Zulip as an open-source option for structured, threaded collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Zulip 12.0 发布，带来新功能和性能提升，改善复杂线程与集成场景下的团队协作。此版本体现了 Zulip 作为开源结构化协作工具的持续成熟。

items.title_en: A grounded conceptual model for ownership types in Rust
items.title_zh: Rust 拥有类型的扎实概念模型
items.summary_en: A grounded conceptual model for Rust's ownership types clarifies how borrowing, lifetimes, and safety semantics fit together. It helps developers reason about memory management and concurrency safety beyond formal type-system details.
items.summary_zh: 对 Rust 的拥有类型提出了一个扎实的概念模型，阐明了借用、生命周期与安全语义如何协同工作，帮助开发者在超越形式类型系统的层面理解内存管理与并发安全。

items.title_en: You can beat the binary search
items.title_zh: 你可以超越二分查找
items.summary_en: Shows that under certain data distributions or with specialized techniques such as interpolation search, you can outperform classic binary search.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出在特定数据分布或条件下，类似插值查找等替代方法可超越二分查找，讨论权衡、缓存行为以及在实际场景中的适用性。

items.title_en: London to Calcutta by Bus (2022)
items.title_zh: 从伦敦到加尔各答的公路之旅（2022）
items.summary_en: A 2022 overland journey by bus from London to Calcutta documents the logistical and border-crossing challenges of long-distance travel by land. The piece contrasts slow, overland travel with the ubiquity of flying, highlighting route choices, time costs, and intercultural encounters along the way.
items.summary_zh: 2022年一场横跨欧洲至亚洲的公路巴士旅程记录了长途陆路旅行的后勤与边境挑战。文章对比了陆路旅行与飞行的差异，强调路线选择、时间成本以及沿途的跨文化体验。

items.title_en: A Primer on Bézier Curves – So What Makes a Bézier Curve?
items.title_zh: 贝塞尔曲线入门：到底是什么构成贝塞尔曲线？
items.summary_en: Breaks down Bezier curves, explaining control points, the De Casteljau construction, and how these curves underpin vector graphics and font design. The guide also contrasts Bezier with other spline types and gives practical tips for use.
items.summary_zh: 贝塞尔曲线入门讲解了控制点、De Casteljau 算法及其在矢量图形、字体设计中的应用，並比较了与其他样条的区别，给出实际使用要点。

items.title_en: New mechanical panoramic film camera from Jeff Bridges
items.title_zh: Jeff Bridges 推出全新机械式全景胶片相机
items.summary_en: Jeff Bridges unveils a new mechanical panoramic film camera, a nod to analog photography in the digital era. The release taps into a niche but growing interest in hands-on, artifact-grade gear and could appeal to film enthusiasts seeking unique wide-format shots.
items.summary_zh: 演员 Jeff Bridges 推出全新机械式全景胶片相机，凸显在数字时代对纯胶片摄影的热情。此举迎合对手工操作、高品质器材的细分市场，或吸引追求独特大画幅效果的胶片爱好者。

items.title_en: Creating a Color Palette from an Image
items.title_zh: 从图片创建调色板
items.summary_en: Extracting a color palette from an image shows how simple algorithms like k-means can capture dominant hues for design or UI theming. The post walks through a practical approach and showcases several resulting palettes.
items.summary_zh: 从图片中提取调色板演示了如 k-means 等简单算法如何捕捉主色，用于设计或界面主题。文章给出实用步骤并展示若干示例调色板。

items.title_en: The Church Rock Uranium Mill Spill
items.title_zh: Church Rock 铀矿厂泄漏事故
items.summary_en: A 1979 uranium mill spill at Church Rock released large amounts of radioactive waste into the desert; it's one of the worst nuclear incidents in US history. It underscores legacy pollution and regulatory challenges in mining and energy sectors, with lessons for tech and policy.
items.summary_zh: Church Rock 铀矿厂在 1979 年发生严重的放射性废料泄漏，成为美国历史上最严重的核事故之一。此事揭示了矿业与能源领域的遗留污染与监管挑战，对科技与政策具有长期影响。

items.title_en: Maladaptive Frugality
items.title_zh: 不良的节俭
items.summary_en: Maladaptive frugality argues that extreme thrift can undermine long-term value, quality, and innovation. The piece urges balancing cost control with intentional investment and risk tolerance in tech and product development.
items.summary_zh: 不良的节俭观提醒我们，过度节省可能削弱长期价值、质量与创新。文章倡导在成本控制与有意投资、承受风险之间取得平衡，特别是在技术与产品开发领域。

items.title_en: Because It Doesn't Have To
items.title_zh: 其实并非一定要这样做
items.summary_en: Questions whether theoretical lower bounds always force heavy computation in practice, urging engineers to consider heuristic or approximate methods where exact solutions are intractable. The piece blends theory with practical design patterns to avoid over-engineering.
items.summary_zh: 质疑理论上的下界是否必然决定必须昂贵的计算，鼓励在不可解的情况下使用启发式或近似方法。文章将理论与实际设计相结合，提出在实际系统中避免过度设计的思路。

items.title_en: Postgres's lateral joins allow for quite the good eDSL
items.title_zh: PostgreSQL 的横向连接让人可以构建相当优秀的 eDSL
items.summary_en: PostgreSQL's lateral joins unlock expressive, embedded DSLs by letting subqueries reference outer columns. The technique can simplify building domain-specific languages inside SQL and enable powerful, composable query patterns.
items.summary_zh: PostgreSQL 的横向连接使子查询能引用外部列，从而支持更具表达力的嵌入式 DSL。此技术有助于在 SQL 内部构建领域特定语言，并实现更强大、可组合的查询模式。

items.title_en: Consequences of passing too few register parameters to a C function
items.title_zh: 向 C 函数传递过少寄存器参数的后果
items.summary_en: Passing too few register parameters to a C function can corrupt the call stack and crash programs due to ABI mismatches. The piece walks through why keeping call conventions aligned matters and how to diagnose such issues.
items.summary_zh: 向 C 函数传递过少寄存器参数会因调用约定不匹配而破坏调用栈、导致程序崩溃。文中解释了为何保持调用约定一致性的重要性以及如何排查相关问题。

items.title_en: My Stratum-0 Atomic Clock
items.title_zh: 我的 Stratum-0 原子钟
items.summary_en: Details a Stratum-0 precision clock project, explaining what constitutes Stratum-0 time, calibration challenges, and why ultra-precise timekeeping matters for distributed systems, communications, and security.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Stratum-0 原子钟的实现与原理，解释何为最高精度的时间参考、标定难点，以及为何对分布式系统、通信和安全至关重要。

items.title_en: DRAM Crunch: Lessons for System Design
items.title_zh: DRAM 短缺：对系统设计的启示
items.summary_en: DRAM supply constraints are forcing designers to rethink memory hierarchy, capacity planning, and power budgets. The piece distills practical lessons for system architects as memory costs rise.
items.summary_zh: DRAM 供给紧张迫使系统设计者重新审视内存层次结构、容量规划和功耗预算。文中为系统架构师提炼了在内存成本上升背景下的实用经验。

items.title_en: I Got Sick of Remembering Port Numbers
items.title_zh: 我终于厌倦了记端口号
items.summary_en: Port numbers are a hassle; the post shares approaches to avoid memorizing them, such as using service discovery, DNS aliases, or local routing tricks. It argues for more ergonomic development workflows in networked services.
items.summary_zh: 端口号记忆麻烦，文中分享通过服务发现、DNS 别名或本地路由等方式来避免记住端口号的方法，主张让开发者在网络服务中拥有更高效的工作流。

items.title_en: "Parse, don't validate" through the years with C++
items.title_zh: 多年来的解析与验证：C++ 的演变
items.summary_en: Charts the evolution of C++ practices from heavy validation toward robust parsing strategies, covering safer parsing techniques, security implications, and how this affects API design and data handling.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 C++ 领域多年来的实践演变，强调从重验证转向更稳健的解析策略，讨论安全性、解析方法的选择及对 API 设计的影响。

items.title_en: How Semiconductors Were Made in America
items.title_zh: 美国产半导体如何制造
items.summary_en: An overview of how semiconductors are made in the United States, covering manufacturing stages, supply-chain constraints, and policy implications that shape where chips are produced. It highlights the push to bring more fabrication domestically to secure critical tech infrastructure and reduce reliance on overseas fabs, with implications for customers and startups relying on domestic supply.
items.summary_zh: 概览美国产半导体制造的各个环节、供应链约束以及影响产地选择的政策因素。文章强调推动本土化晶圆厂建设以增强关键技术基础设施的安全性，并减少对海外晶圆厂的依赖，对依赖国内供应的企业与初创公司影响深远。
